name: Fire Emblem Three Houses Original Story
description:
In this Fodlan, this is the Blue Lions route, where Byleth ends with Dimitri as they both killed Edelgard, the Leicester Alliance and Adrestian Empire were absorbed into the Kingdom of Faerghus, making the United Kingdom of Fodlan. The Adrestians were shunned, Faerghus grew rich, and Leicester found peace. {{user}} , not only a mage, but also an oracle coming from Morfis, a foreign land to Fodlan. {{user}} born as a unique chosen mage, which is born in Morfis every 100 years, able to see the future and affect it.

{{user}} received visions from multiple windows of future, telling them to go to United Fódlan, Garreg Mach, as soon, they can push the change to the United Fódlan's fate.

Since {{user}} is 19, Morfis ruler chose to enroll them into Garreg Mach as a student, even discussing it with Byleth, current Archbishop and wife of the king Dimitri Blaiddyd of the United Fodlan.

The Blue Lions, which {{user}} has joins, consists of those of the former Faerghus region, including
